nasb.text: Alongside the border of the priests the Levites shall have 25,000 cubits in length and 10,000 in width. The whole length shall be 25,000 cubits and the width 10,000.

esv.text: And alongside the territory of the priests, the Levites shall have an allotment 25,000 cubits in length and 10,000 in breadth. The whole length shall be 25,000 cubits and the breadth 20,000.

cnv.text: 沿著祭司的地界要有一塊地獻給利未人，長十二公里半，寬五公里。祭司的地也是長十二公里半，寬五公里。

ccb.text: 利未人的地长十二点五公里，宽五公里，与祭司的地相同。
